policy_text: Employees are eligible for 18 paid leaves per calendar year.
Employees can carry forward up to 5 unused annual leaves to the next calendar year.
Employees are eligible for 7 sick leaves per calendar year. Sick leave should be informed to the manager as soon as possible.
Planned leave must be applied at least 5 working days in advance and approved by the reporting manager.
Employees may work from home up to 2 days per week with prior approval from their reporting manager.
Employees working from home must be available on official communication channels during working hours.
Employees travelling for business must get travel approval before booking tickets.
Employees must submit travel reimbursement claims with valid bills within 7 days of trip completion.
Meal expenses during business travel can be claimed up to the approved daily limit with valid receipts.
Employees working remotely may claim internet reimbursement as per company-approved monthly limit.
Employees must serve a notice period of 60 days after resignation unless otherwise approved by HR.
Employees must not share confidential company or customer information with unauthorized persons.
Employees are expected to maintain professional and respectful behavior with colleagues, customers, and partners.
Employees are covered under company-provided medical insurance as per the applicable policy plan.
Medical reimbursement claims must be submitted with valid medical bills and prescriptions.
